Title: Kog'Maw
Age: Current4 – 33 years old Timeline Born964 AN – 993 AN Edit

children.title: Creation
children.textContent: Kog'Maw was created by the same entity that corrupted Malzahar, being spit out from The Void in Shurima. He spent most of his first days on Runeterra exploring and devouring most things that he saw. He is slowly being drawn towards Malzahar; the purpose of this pull and what will happen when the two meet are both unknown.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent: Kog'Maw is a bipedal creature with short legs that give way to a small upper body, mostly taken up by his head. The head possesses five backwards pointing thorns. Kog'maw also possesses two very small arms. He has four ember colored eyes, a slightly spiked, segmented body, and a cylindrical tongue that Kog'Maw can stick out at will. He has three toes on each foot and is colored blue on the lower half of his body and sand colored on the upper half.

mainContent.title: Personality
mainContent.textContent: Kog'Maw is a curious creature with baseline instincts and seems to have no personality or consciousness beyond that. It is not known to what extent Kog'Maw is able to understand himself or his surroundings, however he is aware of his creator and the destruction that'll come along with the void. Kog'maw is mostly driven by an insatiable hunger and most of his thoughts revolve around food.

children.title: The Watchers
children.textContent: The Watchers are the creators of all voidborn entities, including Kog'Maw, Cho'Gath, Kha'Zix, Rek'Sai, and Vel'Koz. All voidborn creatures are part of a collective whose goal is to learn more about Runeterra and prepare for the Watchers' return.

children.title: Malzahar
children.textContent: Kog'maw is being drawn to Malzahar by the Watchers. The reason for this is not known and it is unknown what will happen once Kog'Maw reaches him.

children.title: Tryndamere
children.textContent: At some point Tryndamere either interacted with Kog'Maw or at least knew of him, as he at some point referred to Kog'Maw, saying "If that's just hungry, I don't want to see angry."

mainContent.title: Change log
mainContent.textContent:
